BURNBABY.title: BURN, BABY, BURN -- MASTER IGNITION ROUTINE
BURNBABY.summary: Master ignition entry used by several LM programs, including P63, during the span between pre-ignition checks and early burn execution.
BURNBABY.commentExcerpt: THE MASTER IGNITION ROUTINE IS DESIGNED FOR USE BY THE FOLLOWING LEM PROGRAMS:  P12, P40, P42, P61, P63.
BURNBABY.commentBlock:
THE MASTER IGNITION ROUTINE IS DESIGNED FOR USE BY THE FOLLOWING LEM PROGRAMS:  P12, P40, P42, P61, P63.
IT PERFORMS ALL FUNCTIONS IMMEDIATELY ASSOCIATED WITH APS OR DPS IGNITION:  IN PARTICULAR, EVERYTHING LYING
BETWEEN THE PRE-IGNITION TIME CHECK -- ARE WE WITHIN 45 SECONDS OF TIG? -- AND TIG + 26 SECONDS, WHEN DPS
PROGRAMS THROTTLE UP.

VARIATIONS AMONG PROGRAMS ARE ACCOMODATED BY MEANS OF TABLES CONTAINING CONSTANTS (FOR AVEGEXIT, FOR
WAITLIST, FOR PINBALL) AND TCF INSTRUCTIONS.  USERS PLACE THE ADRES OF THE HEAD OF THE APPROPRIATE TABLE
(OF P61TABLE FOR P61LM, FOR EXAMPLE) IN ERASABLE REGISTER 'WHICH' (E4).  THE IGNITION ROUTINE THEN INDEXES BY
WHICH TO OBTAIN OR EXECUTE THE PROPER TABLE ENTRY.  THE IGNITION ROUTINE IS INITIATED BY A TCF BURNBABY,
THROUGH BANKJUMP IF NECESSARY.  THERE IS NO RETURN.
BURNBABY.mappingNotes: Curated source context only. This label is not part of the new exact DSKY input map.

CHARIN.title: PINBALL GAME BUTTONS AND LIGHTS
CHARIN.summary: Pinball is the keyboard/display program that mediates astronaut verb/noun interaction with the AGC.
CHARIN.commentExcerpt: EACH DEPRESSION OF A KEYBOARD BUTTON ACTIVATES AN INTERRUPT KEYRUPT1 ... AND ENTERS AN EXECUTIVE REQUEST FOR THE KEYBOARD AND DISPLAY PROGRAM (AT 'CHARIN').
CHARIN.commentBlock:
THE KEYBOARD AND DISPLAY SYSTEM PROGRAM OPERATES UNDER EXECUTIVE
CONTROL AND PROCESSES INFORMATION EXCHANGED BETWEEN THE AGC AND THE
COMPUTER OPERATOR.  THE INPUTS TO THE PROGRAM ARE FROM THE KEYBOARD,
FROM INTERNAL PROGRAM, AND FROM THE UPLINK.

THE LANGUAGE OF COMMUNICATION WITH THE PROGRAM IS A PAIR OF WORDS
KNOWN AS VERB AND NOUN.  EACH OF THESE IS REPRESENTED BY A 2 CHARACTER
DECIMAL NUMBER.  THE VERB CODE INDICATES WHAT ACTION IS TO BE TAKEN, THE
NOUN CODE INDICATES TO WHAT THIS ACTION IS APPLIED.

EACH DEPRESSION OF A KEYBOARD BUTTON ACTIVATES AN INTERRUPT KEYRUPT1
AND PLACES THE 5 BIT KEY CODE INTO CHANNEL 15.  KEYRUPT1 PLACES THE KEY
CODE INTO MPAC, ENTERS AN EXECUTIVE REQUEST FOR THE KEYBOARD AND DISPLAY
PROGRAM (AT 'CHARIN'), AND EXECUTES A RESUME.
CHARIN.mappingNotes: Exact bank-local address derived from the imported AP11ROPE.binsource disassembly and matched against the imported source sequence.

		TC	+1

PROCKEY.summary: Proceed-key routine called from T4RUPT-side logic under executive control.
PROCKEY.commentExcerpt: PROCKEY PERFORMS THE SAME FUNCTION AS VBPROC. IT MUST BE CALLED UNDER EXECUTIVE CONTROL, WITH CHRPRIO.
PROCKEY.commentBlock:

		TS	REQRET
		CS	VD1
		TS	DSPCOUNT
		TC	VBPROC

KEYRUPT1.title: KEYRUPT, UPRUPT
KEYRUPT1.summary: Keyboard interrupt entry that captures the keycode, requests CHARIN, and resumes.
KEYRUPT1.commentExcerpt: KEYRUPT1 TS BANKRUPT / XCH Q / TS QRUPT
KEYRUPT1.commentBlock:
KEYRUPT1	TS	BANKRUPT
		XCH	Q
		TS	QRUPT
		TC	LODSAMPT
		CAF	LOW5
		EXTEND
		RAND	MNKEYIN
KEYRUPT1.mappingNotes: Exact bank-local address taken from the imported rope overlay and confirmed against the imported KEYRUPT source.

		ADS	FLAGWRD5

		TC	NOVAC
		EBANK=	DSPCOUNT
		2CADR	CHARIN

CHARIN_2CADR.commentBlock:
ACCEPTUP	CAF	CHRPRIO
		TC	NOVAC
		EBANK=	DSPCOUNT
		2CADR	CHARIN
CHARIN_2CADR.mappingNotes: This is not an Apollo label. It is a derived alias attached to the exact 2CADR word so the runtime can identify the executive request site honestly.

NEWPHASE.title: LUNAR LANDING GUIDANCE EQUATIONS
NEWPHASE.summary: Flight-sequence tables dispatch guidance behavior by WCHPHASE and branch into later landing phases such as STARTP64.
NEWPHASE.commentExcerpt: FLIGHT SEQUENCE TABLES ARE ARRANGED BY FUNCTION.   THEY ARE REFERENCED USING AS AN INDEX THE REGISTER WCHPHASE:
NEWPHASE.commentBlock:
LUNAR LANDING FLIGHT SEQUENCE TABLES

FLIGHT SEQUENCE TABLES ARE ARRANGED BY FUNCTION.   THEY ARE REFERENCED USING AS AN INDEX THE REGISTER WCHPHASE:
       WCHPHASE = -1 ---> IGNALG
       WCHPHASE =  0 ---> BRAKQUAD
       WCHPHASE =  1 ---> APPRQUAD
       WCHPHASE =  2 ---> VERTICAL

ROUTINES FOR STARTING NEW GUIDANCE PHASES:
       NEWPHASE           TCF      TTFINCR
                           TCF      STARTP64
                           TCF      P65START
NEWPHASE.mappingNotes: Curated source context only. This label is not part of the new exact DSKY input map.

P63LM.title: THE LUNAR LANDING
P63LM.summary: P63 braking-phase setup initializes descent state, BURNBABY routing, and WCHPHASE for lunar landing.
P63LM.commentExcerpt: P63: THE LUNAR LANDING, BRAKING PHASE
P63LM.commentBlock:
****************************************
P63: THE LUNAR LANDING, BRAKING PHASE
****************************************

DO IMU STATUS CHECK ROUTINE R02
INITIALIZE WHICH FOR BURNBABY
INITIALIZE DVMON
INITIALIZE WCHPHASE AND FLPASS0
REMOVE TRACK-ENABLE DISCRETE.
P63LM.mappingNotes: Curated source context only. This label is not part of the new exact DSKY input map.

VARALARM.title: ALARM AND ABORT
VARALARM.summary: VARALARM is the program-alarm path that turns on the program alarm light without issuing a display.
VARALARM.commentExcerpt: VARALARM TURNS ON PROGRAM ALARM LIGHT BUT DOES NOT DISPLAY
VARALARM.commentBlock:
CALLING SEQUENCE FOR VARALARM
               CAF     (ALARM)
               TC      VARALARM

VARALARM TURNS ON PROGRAM ALARM LIGHT BUT DOES NOT DISPLAY

VARALARM           INHINT

TS       L
CA       Q
TS       ALMCADR
TC       PRIOENT
OCT      14
TC       ALMCADR
VARALARM.mappingNotes: Curated source context only. This label is not part of the new exact DSKY input map.
